regions.text: The teacher smiled and said 'Good morning!' to another student. He answered: 'Thank you very much!'
She thought she sounded like she was giving him something. She tried a third student with a hard, sharp voice: 'Good morning!' He answered: 'Please!'
One person may not know what is in another’s mind even when they try to show it. thank: say 'Thank you'. please: may it be your pleasure.
FUTURE: will thank, will please. PRESENT: thank(s), please(s). PAST: thanked, pleased.
